name: Oven Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Spray a 15-1/2 by 10-1/2 jelly roll pan with cooking spray.
2. On waxed paper, mix bread crumbs, cheese, cornmeal, and ground red pepper. In a pie plate, beat egg white and salt.
3. Dip each piece of chicken in egg white, then coat with the bread crumb mixture. Place chicken in the pan; lightly spray with cooking spray.
4. Bake chicken for 35 minutes or until the coating is crisp and juices run clear when pierced with the tip of a knife.
